label._comment: OrigamLabel component tokens — Lot 3.2A. Simple label element used standalone and inside OrigamField. No BEM children — it is itself a BEM child of OrigamField (field.label tokens control its float animation).

font-size.$description: Default label font-size (1em when used inside OrigamField — overridden by field context)

pointer-events.$description: Labels do not capture pointer events (positioned on top of input)

transition-duration.$description: Duration for opacity/transform transitions (float animation driven by JS)

floating._comment: State tokens for .origam-label--floating — the cloned label in the notch.

font-size.$description: Scale of the floating label (corresponds to --origam-field__label---font-size)

visibility.$description: Hidden by default — revealed by JS animation on field activation

required-indicator._comment: The <sup>*</sup> required indicator rendered when `required` prop is true.

color.$description: Color of the asterisk required indicator
